name: AWS GuardDuty Member Deletion or Disassociation Detected
description: This rule detects when GuardDuty members are deleted or disassociated. It may indicate attempts to alter monitoring settings or avoid detection. This could lead to reduced monitoring effectiveness and increased risk of undetected threats.

filterSets.name: AWS GuardDuty Master Account Disassociation Detected
AWS GuardDuty Member Monitoring Stopped Detected

author: Nikki Madayag & Sunil Bharti
